'''chashojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearbait|fearbait]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearbait|fearbait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chashojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshejeth|chæshejeth]] || [[word:chæshejej|chæshejej]] || [[word:chæshejesh|chæshejesh]] || [[word:chæsheje|chæsheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashoshojoth|chashoshojoth]] || [[word:chashoshojoj|chashoshojoj]] || [[word:chashoshojosh|chashoshojosh]] || [[word:chashoshojo|chashoshojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashojoth|chashojoth]] || [[word:chashojoj|chashojoj]] || [[word:chashojosh|chashojosh]] || [[word:chashojo|chashojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashofjoth|chashofjoth]] || [[word:chashofjoj|chashofjoj]] || [[word:chashofjosh|chashofjosh]] || [[word:chashofjof|chashofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashojotho|chashojotho]] || [[word:chashojojo|chashojojo]] || [[word:chashojosho|chashojosho]] || [[word:chashojoko|chashojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashojoth|chashojoth]] || [[word:chashojoj|chashojoj]] || [[word:chashojosh|chashojosh]] || [[word:chashojo|chashojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashojothol|chashojothol]] || [[word:chashojojol|chashojojol]] || [[word:chashojoshol|chashojoshol]] || [[word:chashojokol|chashojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashojothotho|chashojothotho]] || [[word:chashojojojo|chashojojojo]] || [[word:chashojoshosho|chashojoshosho]] || [[word:chashojoko|chashojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashojothon|chashojothon]] || [[word:chashojojon|chashojojon]] || [[word:chashojoshon|chashojoshon]] || [[word:chashojokon|chashojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashojothoro|chashojothoro]] || [[word:chashojojoro|chashojojoro]] || [[word:chashojoshoro|chashojoshoro]] || [[word:chashojokoro|chashojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
